# Demand Intake Request

## Purpose
Capture new demand in a consistent format for triage, prioritization, and approval workflows.

## Audience
Requestor, Demand Manager, Portfolio Manager, PMO Analyst.

## Inputs
- Business strategy and portfolio priorities.
- Stakeholder expectations and constraints.

## Required Sections
- Request metadata
- Problem statement
- Desired outcomes
- Scope and constraints
- Financial assumptions
- Risk and compliance considerations
- Approvals

## 1. Request Metadata
- **Request ID:**
- **Request title:**
- **Requestor name and role:**
- **Date submitted:**
- **Business unit:**

## 2. Problem Statement
Describe the problem or opportunity and the impact of not acting.

## 3. Desired Outcomes
List the outcomes and success measures expected.

## 4. Scope & Constraints
- **In scope:**
- **Out of scope:**
- **Constraints:** (budget, timeline, regulatory)

## 5. Financial Assumptions
- **Estimated cost range:**
- **Expected benefit range:**
- **Funding source:**

## 6. Risk & Compliance Considerations
- **Privacy impact:** (Yes/No; if yes, complete DPIA)
- **Security considerations:**
- **Regulatory requirements:**

## 7. Approvals
| Approver | Role | Decision | Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Request metadata complete.
- [ ] Outcomes and scope clearly defined.
- [ ] Financial assumptions captured.
- [ ] Approvals recorded.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Intake request includes enough detail to support triage and prioritization.
- Privacy and compliance considerations are noted.
